fileContext.overview: OpenAICompatProvider connects to a remote server that exposes the OpenAI /v1/chat/completions API.

symbols.name: complete
symbols.purpose: Generate text based on user input.
symbols.behavior: Makes a POST request to the OpenAI-compatible server with the user input and returns the generated text.
symbols.parameters: messages: LLMMessage[], maxTokens: number, signal?: AbortSignal
symbols.limitations: Requires an API key and may be rate-limited.
